executives.name: Abhijit Talwalkar
executives.background: Mr. Talwalkar has been a director since 2011 and Chairman of the Board since 2019. He was President and CEO of LSI Corporation from 2005 to 2014.

tenure_dates.title: President, Chief Executive Officer, and Director

executives.background: Former Partner at Ernst & Young LLP.

executives.background: Former Chairman and CEO of Novellus Systems. Former Chairman of Marvell (2016-2021).
